chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 264 of 2018 C. P. No. D – 1324 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge C. P. No. D – 264 of 2018 Hearing of case For hearing of main case C. P. No. D – 1324 of 2019 Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.5469/2019 (S/A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.7874/2019 (I Rule 10) 4. For hearing of main case 06.12.2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioners in C. P. No. D-1324 of 2019 and for private respondents in C. P. No. D-264 of 2018. Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- C. P. No. D-264 of 2018: Learned Counsel for petitioner was already put on notice to satisfy the Court about the maintainability of this petition, but he has failed to appear. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. C. P. No. D-1324 of 2019: Learned Counsel for petitioners does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
